description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Reserve the cheapest covered RV storage space that is at least 35 ft long, costs at most $250 per month, and is available for a move-in date of May 10, 2026 on a monthly billing plan, then complete the reservation form.
tasks.name: Reserve the cheapest covered RV storage space that is at least 35 ft long, costs at most $250 per month, and is available for a move-in date of May 10, 2026 on a monthly billing plan, then complete the reservation form.
tasks.description: Reserve the cheapest covered RV storage space that is at least 35 ft long, costs at most $250 per month, and is available for a move-in date of May 10, 2026 on a monthly billing plan, then complete the reservation form.

tasks.instruction: Compare one indoor and one outdoor boat storage space that can each fit a 24 ft boat and include electrical power, then choose the option with the lower monthly price, select the earliest available move-in date, and start the booking.
tasks.name: Compare one indoor and one outdoor boat storage space that can each fit a 24 ft boat and include electrical power, then choose the option with the lower monthly price, select the earliest available move-in date, and start the booking.

tasks.instruction: At a facility within 15 miles of ZIP code 85004 that offers both RV and boat storage, reserve one RV space at least 30 ft long costing at most $220 per month and one boat space at least 20 ft long costing at most $150 per month at the same facility, then proceed to the combined reservation summary.

tasks.instruction: Book any RV storage space at least 40 ft long that costs under $300 per month, set the move-in date to June 1, 2026, choose a 12-month prepay billing option that clearly includes at least one free month, and continue to payment after entering the requested guest information.
tasks.name: Book any RV storage space at least 40 ft long that costs under $300 per month, set the move-in date to June 1, 2026, choose a 12-month prepay billing option that clearly includes at least one free month, and continue to payment after entering the requested guest information.

tasks.instruction: Create a new user account on the site, then from the account dashboard open the first reservation listed and enable credit-card autopay for it using the provided card details.
tasks.name: Create a new user account on the site, then from the account dashboard open the first reservation listed and enable credit-card autopay for it using the provided card details.
tasks.description: Create a new user account on the site, then from the account dashboard open the first reservation listed and enable credit-card autopay for it using the provided card details.

tasks.instruction: Log in with existing credentials, open the first upcoming reservation, change the move-in date to July 5, 2026, upgrade to the next larger available unit that costs no more than $40 more per month than the current unit, and confirm the updated reservation.
tasks.name: Log in with existing credentials, open the first upcoming reservation, change the move-in date to July 5, 2026, upgrade to the next larger available unit that costs no more than $40 more per month than the current unit, and confirm the updated reservation.

tasks.instruction: From the Help or FAQ section, find how much the required security deposit is, then use the contact form to send a billing question asking how many days after move-out that deposit is refunded.
tasks.name: From the Help or FAQ section, find how much the required security deposit is, then use the contact form to send a billing question asking how many days after move-out that deposit is refunded.
tasks.description: From the Help or FAQ section, find how much the required security deposit is, then use the contact form to send a billing question asking how many days after move-out that deposit is refunded.

tasks.instruction: Using a facility’s interactive site map, filter to pull-through RV spaces near the exit gate that are at least 30 ft long, select one whose space number ends in 5, and start a reservation for that exact space.
tasks.name: Using a facility’s interactive site map, filter to pull-through RV spaces near the exit gate that are at least 30 ft long, select one whose space number ends in 5, and start a reservation for that exact space.

tasks.instruction: Start a reservation for any uncovered RV space at least 30 ft long that costs under $220 per month with a move-in date of May 20, 2026, then on the add-ons step select both a recurring battery-maintenance add-on and a recurring exterior wash-area access add-on priced at $25 per month or less, leave any gate-access add-on priced over $10 per month unselected, and continue to the total price summary.
